{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Administrative Assistant",
  "description": "Johngate Industrial Company Limited is an indigenous Company which came into existence in January 12, 1987. Johngate Industrial Company Limited human safety and comfort in driving is our most valuable priority,that is while we are the best suppliers of quality automobile products in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Alakija, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Ensure smooth day-to-day running of the office operations
	Prepare, update, and manage official records and correspondence
	Ensure submission of reports and documentation
	Schedule and coordinate meetings, appointments, and evets.
	Assist with staff attendance records
	Maintain updated staff &amp; student files.
	Provide general administrative and clerical support to the office.
	Manage incoming calls, emails, and correspondence.
	Schedule meetings, appointments, and maintain calendars.
	Prepare reports, documents, and presentations as required.
	Maintain filing systems (physical and electronic).
	Assist in coordinating office activities and operations.
	Handle office supplies inventory and place orders when necessary.
	Support HR and management with documentation and staff records.
	Assist in organizing company events, meetings, or training.
	Welcome visitors and direct them to the appropriate department.


Requirements


	Must possess at least a B.Sc,&nbsp;&nbsp;B.Ed, or HND, in Business Administration, Mass Communication, Marketing or other related fields from reputable institutions.
	Must possess at least 2 years of cognate experience working as an administrator/ marketer.
	Meticulous attention to detail with superb organizational skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;johngate1234hr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Administrative Assistant Job at Johngate Industrial Company Limited




        
    

        
        Johngate Industrial Company Limited is an indigenous Company which came into existence in January 12, 1987. Johngate Industrial Company Limited human safety and comfort in driving is our most valuable priority,that is while we are the best suppliers of quality automobile products in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Administrative Assistant

Job Location: Alakija, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Ensure smooth day-to-day running of the office operations
	Prepare, update, and manage official records and correspondence
	Ensure submission of reports and documentation
	Schedule and coordinate meetings, appointments, and evets.
	Assist with staff attendance records
	Maintain updated staff & student files.
	Provide general administrative and clerical support to the office.
	Manage incoming calls, emails, and correspondence.
	Schedule meetings, appointments, and maintain calendars.
	Prepare reports, documents, and presentations as required.
	Maintain filing systems (physical and electronic).
	Assist in coordinating office activities and operations.
	Handle office supplies inventory and place orders when necessary.
	Support HR and management with documentation and staff records.
	Assist in organizing company events, meetings, or training.
	Welcome visitors and direct them to the appropriate department.


Requirements


	Must possess at least a B.Sc,  B.Ed, or HND, in Business Administration, Mass Communication, Marketing or other related fields from reputable institutions.
	Must possess at least 2 years of cognate experience working as an administrator/ marketer.
	Meticulous attention to detail with superb organizational skills.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet tight deadlines.
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Marketer",
  "description": "Johngate Industrial Company Ltd is an indigenous Company which came into existence in January 12, 1987. Johngate Industrial Company Limited human safety and comfort in driving is our most valuable priority,that is while we are the best suppliers of quality automobile products in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer

Job Location:&nbsp;Alakija, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	We are seeking energetic Marketers to driveour sales and drive business growth across diverse markets.
	In this role, you will develop strategic sales initiatives, foster strong client relationships, and oversee the execution of sales activities to meet and exceed company targets.
	Your leadership will inspire a high-performing team dedicated to delivering exceptional customer service and innovative solutions.
	This position offers an exciting opportunity to influence our company&#39;s expansion while honing your management and sales expertise in a dynamic environment.


Responsibilities


	Lead, motivate, and manage a team of sales professionals specializing in outside sales, business-to-business (B2B) transactions, and technical sales.
	Develop comprehensive marketing strategies to identify new business opportunities and expand existing accounts.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, understanding their needs to provide tailored solutions that foster loyalty.
	Oversee the entire sales cycle from prospecting and lead generation to negotiation and closing deals.
	Utilize Salesforce or similar CRM tools to track sales activities, analyze performance metrics, and optimize outreach strategies.
	Collaborate with marketing teams to create campaigns that enhance brand visibility and generate qualified leads.
	Conduct market analysis to stay ahead of industry trends, competitive landscape, and emerging technology solutions.
	Provide regular training, coaching, and performance feedback to ensure team success and professional development.


Requirements


	Proven experience in outside sales, B2B sales, or technology sales with a track record of meeting or exceeding targets.
	Strong management skills with the ability to lead diverse teams effectively.
	Excellent negotiation, communication, and customer service skills essential for building lasting client relationships.
	Familiarity with Salesforce or other CRM platforms for managing sales pipelines and analyzing data.
	Knowledge of marketing principles and business development strategies to drive growth initiatives.
	Analytical skills to interpret sales data, market trends, and customer feedback for strategic planning.
	Demonstrated leadership qualities with the ability to motivate teams and foster a collaborative environment.
	Experience in account management, technical sales, or related fields is highly desirable.
	Join us as a Marketer and be at the forefront of our growth journey! Bring your passion for sales excellence, leadership prowess, and innovative mindset to help us reach new heights while delivering outstanding value to our clients worldwide.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;johngate1234hr@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Proximity to location will be given top prority.",

Marketer Job at Johngate Industrial Company Limited




        
    

        
        Johngate Industrial Company Ltd is an indigenous Company which came into existence in January 12, 1987. Johngate Industrial Company Limited human safety and comfort in driving is our most valuable priority,that is while we are the best suppliers of quality automobile products in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Marketer

Job Location: Alakija, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking energetic Marketers to driveour sales and drive business growth across diverse markets.
	In this role, you will develop strategic sales initiatives, foster strong client relationships, and oversee the execution of sales activities to meet and exceed company targets.
	Your leadership will inspire a high-performing team dedicated to delivering exceptional customer service and innovative solutions.
	This position offers an exciting opportunity to influence our company's expansion while honing your management and sales expertise in a dynamic environment.


Responsibilities


	Lead, motivate, and manage a team of sales professionals specializing in outside sales, business-to-business (B2B) transactions, and technical sales.
	Develop comprehensive marketing strategies to identify new business opportunities and expand existing accounts.
	Build and maintain strong relationships with clients, understanding their needs to provide tailored solutions that foster loyalty.
	Oversee the entire sales cycle from prospecting and lead generation to negotiation and closing deals.
	Utilize Salesforce or similar CRM tools to track sales activities, analyze performance metrics, and optimize outreach strategies.
	Collaborate with marketing teams to create campaigns that enhance brand visibility and generate qualified leads.
	Conduct market analysis to stay ahead of industry trends, competitive landscape, and emerging technology solutions.
	Provide regular training, coaching, and performance feedback to ensure team success and professional development.


Requirements


	Proven experience in outside sales, B2B sales, or technology sales with a track record of meeting or exceeding targets.
	Strong management skills with the ability to lead diverse teams effectively.
	Excellent negotiation, communication, and customer service skills essential for building lasting client relationships.
	Familiarity with Salesforce or other CRM platforms for managing sales pipelines and analyzing data.
	Knowledge of marketing principles and business development strategies to drive growth initiatives.
	Analytical skills to interpret sales data, market trends, and customer feedback for strategic planning.
	Demonstrated leadership qualities with the ability to motivate teams and foster a collaborative environment.
	Experience in account management, technical sales, or related fields is highly desirable.
	Join us as a Marketer and be at the forefront of our growth journey! Bring your passion for sales excellence, leadership prowess, and innovative mindset to help us reach new heights while delivering outstanding value to our clients worldwide.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Proximity to location will be given top prority.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Waiter and Waitress Job at Class Suites Hotels & Apartment




        
    

        
        Class Suites Hotels & Apartment isa modern styled hotel chain with numerous locations in Lagos, Abuja, Ibadan and is close proximity to the Airport.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Waiter and Waitress

Job Location: Jabi, Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Greet and escort customers to their tables
	Present menu and provide detailed information when asked (e.g. about portions, ingredients or potential food allergies)

	Serve food and drink orders.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Procurement / Logistics Officer",
  "description": "Eta Zuma Mining and Industries Limited provides premium solutions to businesses in the primary and secondary sectors of the economy, especially those in solid minerals, extractive industry, manufacturing industry and agriculture. Some of its clients are Zuma 828 Coal Limited, IMEX Mineral Resources and Processing Company, Zuma Energy Nigeria Limited, Zuma Steel W/A Limited, and Zuma Metals &amp; Energy Resources Limited

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement / Logistics Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Kogi

Job Summary


	The Procurement / Logistics Officer is responsible for sourcing suppliers, negotiating prices, preparing purchase orders, and coordinating the movement, delivery, and storage of goods.
	The role ensures timely procurement, cost efficiency, accurate documentation, and smooth logistics operations in compliance with company policies and operational standards.


Key Responsibilities
Procurement Duties:


	Source, evaluate, and select credible suppliers/vendors.
	Prepare purchase orders and ensure compliance with procurement procedures.
	Negotiate prices, delivery terms, and payment conditions.
	Track purchase requisitions and ensure timely delivery of requested items.
	Maintain vendor records, price lists, and procurement documentation.
	Monitor supplier performance and maintain healthy supplier relationships.


Logistics Duties:


	Coordinate logistics for inbound and outbound movement of goods.
	Track deliveries and follow up with suppliers or transporters.
	Verify delivered items (quality, quantity, specifications) before acceptance.
	Liaise with stores/warehouse for proper receiving and documentation.
	Arrange proper transportation, dispatch, and distribution schedules.
	Ensure compliance with safety, regulatory, and quality standards during logistics operations.


Documentation &amp; Reporting:


	Maintain accurate procurement and logistics records (POs, invoices, delivery notes).
	Prepare weekly and monthly procurement/logistics activity reports.
	Ensure document filing, transparency, and audit readiness.


Qualifications &amp; Requirements
Education:


	OND / HND / B.Sc. in: Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, Logistics &amp; Transport, Purchasing &amp; Supply, Or related field


Experience:


	3-5 years of experience in procurement, logistics, or supply chain roles.
	Experience working with vendors, transporters, and warehouse teams is an advantage.


Skills &amp; Competencies:


	Strong negotiation and vendor management skills
	Knowledge of procurement procedures and inventory systems
	Good understanding of logistics and transportation operations
	Proficiency in Excel and ERP/inventory software
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	High level of accuracy, accountability, and integrity
	Ability to multitask and work under pressure
	Good record?keeping and reporting skills
",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-22",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

Procurement / Logistics Officer Job at Eta Zuma Mining & Industries Limited




        
    

        
        Eta Zuma Mining and Industries Limited provides premium solutions to businesses in the primary and secondary sectors of the economy, especially those in solid minerals, extractive industry, manufacturing industry and agriculture. Some of its clients are Zuma 828 Coal Limited, IMEX Mineral Resources and Processing Company, Zuma Energy Nigeria Limited, Zuma Steel W/A Limited, and Zuma Metals & Energy Resources Limited

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Procurement / Logistics Officer

Job Location: Kogi

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Procurement / Logistics Officer is responsible for sourcing suppliers, negotiating prices, preparing purchase orders, and coordinating the movement, delivery, and storage of goods.
	The role ensures timely procurement, cost efficiency, accurate documentation, and smooth logistics operations in compliance with company policies and operational standards.


Key Responsibilities
Procurement Duties:


	Source, evaluate, and select credible suppliers/vendors.
	Prepare purchase orders and ensure compliance with procurement procedures.
	Negotiate prices, delivery terms, and payment conditions.
	Track purchase requisitions and ensure timely delivery of requested items.
	Maintain vendor records, price lists, and procurement documentation.
	Monitor supplier performance and maintain healthy supplier relationships.


Logistics Duties:


	Coordinate logistics for inbound and outbound movement of goods.
	Track deliveries and follow up with suppliers or transporters.
	Verify delivered items (quality, quantity, specifications) before acceptance.
	Liaise with stores/warehouse for proper receiving and documentation.
	Arrange proper transportation, dispatch, and distribution schedules.
	Ensure compliance with safety, regulatory, and quality standards during logistics operations.


Documentation & Reporting:


	Maintain accurate procurement and logistics records (POs, invoices, delivery notes).
	Prepare weekly and monthly procurement/logistics activity reports.
	Ensure document filing, transparency, and audit readiness.


Qualifications & Requirements
Education:


	OND / HND / B.Sc. in: Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, Logistics & Transport, Purchasing & Supply, Or related field


Experience:


	3-5 years of experience in procurement, logistics, or supply chain roles.
	Experience working with vendors, transporters, and warehouse teams is an advantage.


Skills & Competencies:


	Strong negotiation and vendor management skills
	Knowledge of procurement procedures and inventory systems
	Good understanding of logistics and transportation operations
	Proficiency in Excel and ERP/inventory software
	Strong communication and interpersonal skills
	High level of accuracy, accountability, and integrity
	Ability to multitask and work under pressure
	Good record?keeping and reporting skills
    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Client Relation Officer",
  "description": "Pem Security Guard Network Limited is a fully licensed &amp; insured security company with years of experience in the industry with a mission to provide top-notch security services to our clients, such that their expectation are met and exceeded, while being spotless &amp; professional at it.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Client Relation Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Umuahia, Abia
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a dedicated and knowledgeable Client Relation Officer to join our esteemed team in the Security and Investigations industry.
	In this pivotal role, you will act as the primary point of contact for our clients, ensuring the highest level of customer satisfaction and support. Your primary objective will be to foster and maintain strong relationships with clients, addressing their needs and concerns promptly and effectively.
	As a representative of our organization, you will be responsible for understanding the complexities of our security services and helping clients navigate them with ease and confidence.
	This role demands a proactive approach to managing client expectations, building trust, and providing tailored solutions that meet individual security requirements.
	To succeed in this position, you must possess excellent communication and interpersonal skills, backed by a strong understanding of the security landscape.
	Your ability to analyze client feedback and engage in problem-solving will be crucial to enhancing the overall client experience.
	If you are driven by a commitment to service excellence and are eager to contribute to the security and safety of individuals and organizations, we encourage you to apply and become a key member of our dynamic team.


Responsibilities


	Serve as the primary liaison between clients and the organization, ensuring seamless communication.
	Address client inquiries and concerns quickly and professionally, providing timely resolutions.
	Conduct regular follow-ups with clients to assess satisfaction and gather feedback on services.
	Identify and understand client needs, offering tailored solutions that align with their security objectives.

Client Relation Officer Job at Pem Security Guard Network Limited




        
    

        
        Pem Security Guard Network Limited is a fully licensed & insured security company with years of experience in the industry with a mission to provide top-notch security services to our clients, such that their expectation are met and exceeded, while being spotless & professional at it.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Client Relation Officer

Job Location: Umuahia, Abia
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking a dedicated and knowledgeable Client Relation Officer to join our esteemed team in the Security and Investigations industry.
	In this pivotal role, you will act as the primary point of contact for our clients, ensuring the highest level of customer satisfaction and support. Your primary objective will be to foster and maintain strong relationships with clients, addressing their needs and concerns promptly and effectively.
	As a representative of our organization, you will be responsible for understanding the complexities of our security services and helping clients navigate them with ease and confidence.
	This role demands a proactive approach to managing client expectations, building trust, and providing tailored solutions that meet individual security requirements.
	To succeed in this position, you must possess excellent communication and interpersonal skills, backed by a strong understanding of the security landscape.
	Your ability to analyze client feedback and engage in problem-solving will be crucial to enhancing the overall client experience.
	If you are driven by a commitment to service excellence and are eager to contribute to the security and safety of individuals and organizations, we encourage you to apply and become a key member of our dynamic team.


Responsibilities


	Serve as the primary liaison between clients and the organization, ensuring seamless communication.
	Address client inquiries and concerns quickly and professionally, providing timely resolutions.
	Conduct regular follow-ups with clients to assess satisfaction and gather feedback on services.
	Identify and understand client needs, offering tailored solutions that align with their security objectives.
	Collaborate with internal teams to ensure client requirements are met effectively and efficiently.
	Maintain detailed records of client interactions and service-related documentation.
	Assist in developing strategies to enhance client relationships and improve service delivery.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree in Business Administration, Communication, or a related field with 1 - 3 years work experience.
	Proven experience in client relations or customer service, preferably within the security sector.
	Exceptional communication skills, both verbal and written, with a strong aptitude for interpersonal interactions.
	Ability to manage multiple tasks and prioritize effectively in a fast-paced environment.
	Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with a keen attention to detail.
	Proficient in using customer relationship management (CRM) software and Microsoft Office Suite.
	A professional demeanor, with a commitment to maintaining confidentiality and ethical standards.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location as the subject of the mail.

Note: For inquiries, call or send a WhatsApp message to: 08167388336
